overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a sunny courtyard, ascending stairs to an upper walkway, entering apartment 1242, and exploring the neon-lit interior living space and workshop. The clip transitions from bright natural outdoor lighting to moody artificial indoor lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny residential courtyard with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through sunny courtyard toward building entrance, passing outdoor seating and palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm tree in center of courtyard
tan-colored residential building with green trim and balconies
tall modern glass building visible in background
metal table and chairs with umbrella on patio
green hedge bushes lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunny courtyard with palm trees and modern residential buildings. The camera moves forward past outdoor seating areas and hedges toward a two-story building entrance, with a glass skyscraper visible in the background against a clear blue sky.

events.description: begins ascending metal staircase to upper level walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing metal grate stairs with green railings to reach the second floor

entered.detail: metal grate staircase with green painted railings
dark concrete wall with graffiti on left side of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and begins ascending a metal staircase between buildings. The concrete wall on the left features graffiti, while the previously seen two-story building is now visible on the right. The sky becomes partially obscured by the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered exterior walkway leading to apartment door

events.description: uses security keypad to unlock apartment door 1242

agents.ego_description: walking along covered exterior walkway with metal grate flooring toward apartment entrance

entered.detail: covered walkway with metal mesh ceiling casting grid shadows
dark door with large illuminated numbers 1242
electronic keypad with green light and display screen

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered walkway with metal grate flooring that casts striped shadows. The corridor leads to apartment door 1242, where the player interacts with a security keypad to unlock the door, transitioning from exterior to interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living room with gaming setup

events.description: enters apartment interior from exterior walkway, lighting shifts to neon and artificial

agents.ego_description: entering apartment and looking around the neon-lit living area with arcade machine and computer desk

entered.detail: green beaded curtain at entrance doorway
worn yellow armchair with items on it
retro-style arcade game cabinet with colorful screen
desk with multiple monitors and red LED lighting
bed with striped blanket and pillows
floating shelves with various items and purple lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the apartment through a beaded curtain into a dimly lit living space illuminated by neon accents. The room contains a yellow armchair, retro arcade machine, computer desk with red lighting, and a bed. The player explores the space, panning to show wall shelves and various cyberpunk decor elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workshop with tool storage and workbench

events.description: moves from living area into workshop room with industrial lighting and tool storage

agents.ego_description: exploring the workshop area with tool wall, workbench, and industrial equipment

entered.detail: cluttered workbench with tools and equipment
pegboard wall with hanging tools and weapon racks
long fluorescent tube light on ceiling
yellow and blue equipment cases on floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the living area into an adjacent workshop room with industrial metal walls and fluorescent lighting. The space features a tool wall with hanging equipment, a workbench, and storage cases. The lighting shifts from neon to utilitarian white fluorescent as the player explores the crafting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched residential courtyard into the moody, neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk apartment. It begins by moving past palm trees and outdoor seating toward a building entrance under a clear blue sky, before turning left to ascend a metal staircase flanked by graffiti-covered concrete. As the camera reaches the upper level, it follows a covered walkway of metal grates and striped shadows toward apartment door 1242, where the environment shifts abruptly from natural light to a dimly lit interior upon unlocking the door. The scene then expands through a beaded curtain into a living space filled with neon accents, a retro arcade machine, and red-lit computer desks, before finally transitioning into an adjacent workshop characterized by industrial metal walls and utilitarian white fluorescent lighting.
